overview: Skeleton Guardman is a Normal-class Undead monster. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 52 HP, 22 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. Has a Staggered reaction in its ability set. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 180% ratio (396 base damage). Sight range 800, combat radius 125.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Has Stagger Reaction (ImpactRes 3, Endurance 6)
strategies.description: This monster has a Staggered ability in its ability set, meaning it has a stagger reaction animation. ImpactResistance: 3, MaxImpactEndurance: 6.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 800 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 800 units, loses target at 1200 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 125, ability check distance 170
strategies.description: Combat area radius 125. Ability check distance 170. Ability attack delay: 1.5s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 800 units. Loses target at 1200 units.
